transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Starting the compensation claim process for my delayed flight
transcript.text: Hi, I had a flight delay and I'd like to file a claim for compensation
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I'm the passenger
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
Yes, let's go
I can definitely help with that. To start, I'll just need some information to identify you — could you provide your **full name** exactly as it appears on your ticket, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing my full name as it appears on the booking
transcript.text: Sabine Prendergast
Thanks, Sabine! Could you please share your **booking reference number**? It's a 6-character code made up of letters and/or numbers, found in your booking confirmation email.
ERTD6Z

Just to confirm:
- **First name:** Sabine
- **Last name:** Prendergast
- **Booking reference:** ERTD6Z

Is that all correct?

transcript.note: Confirming all the details are correct
transcript.text: Yes, that's correct
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll send a one-time verification code to your email on file (l*****@a*****.com). Shall I go ahead?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it. If you haven't received a code, please wait 1 minute before requesting a new one.
§W§BANNER§Your identity has been verified.
Can you confirm that this is the trip you're claiming for?
§W§FLIGHT§YUL → YYZ · Fri, Jul 10 · AC8002 · 08:00→11:00 · nonstop
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
§W§OPTIONS§Canada • United States • Other
Canada
I'm sorry — I can't review this case automatically right now. Would you like me to submit it for one of our agents to review?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, submit for review • No thanks

transcript.note: The bot cannot process this automatically and is offering to submit to an agent - this is a final outcome (handed to agent)
transcript.text: Yes, submit for review
§W§BANNER§Your case has been submitted for agent review.
An agent will follow up with you by email with the next steps.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

verdict.reasoning: The expected outcome was ELIGIBLE with system code FD-APPR-EL-15 and CAD 400 compensation. However, the chatbot did not reach any eligibility determination. Instead, after collecting all necessary information and confirming the passenger's residence in Canada, the bot stated it "can't review this case automatically right now" and escalated to agent review. This represents a failure to render the automated decision. The bot never displayed an eligibility status, system code, or compensation amount. Therefore, reached_determination=false and matches_expected=false.
